content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally post-election results: Nifty +0.86%, Bank Nifty +0.88%, Auto +1.40%, Realty +2.02%, Pharma +1.05%, PSU Bank +1.20%. India VIX cooling (-2.11%) at 18.07. Existing book is +1.16% today with multiple winners. Priority: trail SLs aggressively on winners to lock in gains while letting them run; avoid new chase entries given many names already extended.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.27,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +7.0% with strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%, AUM +13%). Current SL 1035.27 is already ~1.7% below CMP 1052.80 — tight enough, locks in ~5% gain. Trail-gap discipline: raising further would put SL too close to CMP. Holding HOLD via no-op... actually current SL is fine; emitting MODIFY would be no-op so converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at 1035.27 already locks in +5.2% gain, ~1.6% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Q4 numbers strong (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%). CEO transition is the lingering governance overhang but not actionable today. Let it run toward target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.7%, CMP 122.93 vs SL 119 (-3.2% from CMP). Macro hedge intact; gold +1.11% today rebounding. SL appropriately wide for ETF volatility. No adjustment warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1801.24,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1801.24 already above entry 1734 (locks +3.9%). CMP 1835 — SL ~1.8% below CMP, within trail-gap. No-op MODIFY would be wasted; converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Sector leader +3.17% today, near 52-wk high (1851), Organon deal momentum. SL 1801.24 already locks +3.9% gain (1.8% below CMP). Q4 May 19 — binary event flag. Will re-evaluate as event approaches; for now SL placement is appropriate. Target 1880 nearly hit at 1841 high."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.50,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.8%, CMP 484.50 at 52-wk high zone (52-wk high 485.70). SL 475 currently ~2% below CMP. Tightening SL to 478.50 (~1.2% below CMP) locks better gain given price is at resistance. April production -9.7% YoY is a concern. Trail-gap maintained at >0.5%. Old SL 475 → new 478.50 = 0.74% raise (above no-op threshold)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 207.78,
      "new_target": 215.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.0% at 52-wk high (204.44 broken to 207.65). 8.2x volume surge confirms institutional bid. Stored SL 207.78 currently sits AT/ABOVE CMP 206.90 — that's a self-stopout risk per trail-gap discipline. But tightening further is wrong direction; SL needs to stay below CMP. Raising target only to 215 (extending runway) and keeping SL — actually SL 207.78 > CMP 206.90 means stop already triggered logic. Reading carefully: SL is 207.78, CMP 206.90, so SL is ABOVE CMP by 0.88 — this is an improper trail. Per state-verification: 207.78 > 206.90 means long-position SL above CMP = exit imminent. Better to EXIT cleanly to lock +3.4% rather than wait for messy stop fill."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 250,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 207.78 is ABOVE CMP 206.90 — stop is effectively at/above market and will trip on any downtick. Per trail-gap discipline (SL must sit ≥0.5% below LTP), the position is already compromised. Cleaner to EXIT at market and lock gain (~+3.5%) than wait for messy stop execution. Q4 FY26 PAT +68% YoY but full-year -55% YoY; profit-booking risk after sharp rally to 52-wk high. Cancels the prior MODIFY decision for this name."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 165,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 296 vs CMP 294.80 — SL ABOVE CMP by 1.20, position effectively stopped. Held -2.6%. Crude expected to remain elevated but short-term de-escalation in Middle East compressing premium; intraday -2.19%. Better to take small loss cleanly and free capital than wait for stop fill at worse price. Q4 not until May 21 — extended event window."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.9%, CMP 24.09 vs SL 23.55 (-2.2% below CMP). Pharma sector +1.05% today, generics tariff exemption intact. SL appropriately placed; let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.1%, CMP 954.55 vs SL 928 (-2.8% below CMP). Q4 in-line, NIM compressed slightly. SL appropriately placed below entry; not yet at +2% trail trigger. Hold for target 985."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1672.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.6%, CMP 1705 at 52-wk high (1672 prior high broken). Q4 strong: revenue +27%, EBITDA +20%, PAT +9.4%; FY27 guidance robust. Raising SL from 1655 to 1672 (prior 52-wk high as support) — locks near-breakeven, improves risk profile. New SL 1.94% below CMP, within trail-gap. Old→new SL: +1.03% raise (above no-op)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.7%, CMP 1538 vs SL 1490 (-3.1% below CMP). Stock made fresh 52-wk high 1600 today then faded — shooting-star action. Board meeting May 14 with Q4 + dividend = binary event in 8 sessions. SL placement adequate; let it work. Will re-assess closer to event."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035.27 already locks +5.2%, 1.6% below CMP — appropriate trail. Let run to 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; SL 119 appropriately wide for ETF."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1801.24 already above entry, 1.8% below CMP. Q4 May 19 — will trim/tighten closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.50,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 475 to 478.50 (~1.2% below CMP) to better lock gains as price tests 52-wk high resistance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 207.78 sits above CMP 206.90 — self-stopout imminent. Exit cleanly at market to lock gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 296 above CMP 294.80 — already effectively stopped. Exit at market, free capital."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.55 appropriately placed 2.2% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 928 below entry, 2.8% below CMP. Not yet at +2% to warrant trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1672.00,
      "reasoning": "Raise SL to prior 52-wk high (now support). Locks near-breakeven on a name at fresh ATH with strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting May 14 — binary event flag. Will re-examine ~3 sessions before. SL 1490 appropriate for now."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL, BAJAJ-AUTO, MARUTI, SYNGENE, FLUOROCHEM all extended on big up days — chase risk too high for fresh entries today. KOTAKBANK Q4 reaction (-5%) interesting but already bounced 4% from intraday low (363→375); want to see consolidation before considering. EXIDEIND/MANAPPURAM Q4 today after-market — wait for results, no entry into binary. INFY: structural FY27 guidance disappointment + bearish MACD; not a buy yet despite optical cheapness.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Two SL-above-CMP situations (BANDHANBNK, ONGC) being cleaned up via EXIT — both reflect prior trail-gap mismanagement that the engine would have triggered messily. Net unrealized +₹11,670 with deployed capital 51%. After the two EXITs, cash freed up to ~₹560k and positions concentrated on cleaner setups (PNBHOUSING, SUNPHARMA, ADANIPORTS, COALINDIA winners). Multiple binary events approaching: SUNPHARMA May 19, GESHIP May 14, ONGC was May 21 (now exited). Will tighten further as events near. Not adding new names today — book is well-positioned on election rally, chasing extended movers is the failure-mode signature."
}
